title: Assess plan pinning freshness strategy
goal: Assess how to bind runtime automation plan revisions without staling existing receipts or blocking dependent task eligibility.

metadata.safety_boundary: analysis and strategy only; no current_plan mutation without explicit revalidation plan

lease_scope_migration.rationale: Plan pinning freshness spans eligibility code, current-plan Registry semantics and the documented compatibility strategy.
does_not_establish: safe mutation of terminal historical tasks

acceptance.assertion: The assessment explains how current_plan changes affect envelopes, receipts, stale overlays and dependency eligibility.
The assessment compares path-bound plans, pre-verification pinning, separate maintenance initiatives and explicit re-verification strategies.
The task does not add current_plan.commit or document_sha256 to this initiative unless a no-stall revalidation strategy is already documented.
Any actual pinning or re-verification work is registered as a separate follow-up after the strategy is accepted.
